_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Participate in the acquisition process as necessary, following appropriate supply chain risk management practices.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model adoption, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, third-party dataset provenance, and model registry security controls.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-014 (DA, cosine: 0.452), RM-T-007 (RM, cosine: 0.442).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.449). Shared vocabulary: [chain, supply]. DCWF-only terms [acquisition, appropriate, following, management, necessary, participate] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.893, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Participate in the acquisition process as necessary, following appropriate suppl" and "Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.498 ≈ STS 0.449 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [chain, supply] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [chain, supply]. DCWF-only: [acquisition, appropriate, following, management, necessary, participate]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, knowledge].
